3282060.name: CyberSeas
3282060.description:
Welcome to the CyberSeas, a post-apocalyptic near-future where cyber pirates rule the flooded remains of civilisation. Your jet ship comes equipped with a harpoon, allowing you to grapple and swing around the environment. Complete missions for a colorful cast of characters, including competing in races, performing tricks, finding collectibles and more!

CyberSeas contains three unique maps to explore, dozens of missions to complete, upgrades to equip your boat with and many hours of fun.
3282060.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
